title: Washing Line Hanging Hooks by Smith’s® | 24 Pack | Clothes Hook Windproof Pegs | Perfect for Clothesline, Rotary Washing Line, Coat Hangers & Drying Rack | Reduces Need to Iron Clothes
features: WINDPROOF - Do you ever get tired of those pesky windy days? No need to dread them anymore! Designed to withstand the full force of the wind, keeping your clothes safe and firmly on your line.
NO PEG MARKS - Leaves no nasty clothes peg marks, and made from safe, very strong, high-quality PVC. Each washing line hook is built for long-term use, does not deform, and is VERY easy to use.
MULTI-PURPOSE - Our washing line hangers come in a pack of 24, and measure 6.2 x 4.1 x 0.5cm. Perfect for indoor and outdoor clotheslines, retractable clotheslines, and rotary washing lines.
CHECK YOUR LINE - Our hooks fit 99% of washing and rotary lines. But, if for whatever reason our pegs do not fit snugly on your line, then we happily offer and honour a free return and full refund.
3 YEAR GUARANTEE - Designed in Britain. We are so confident in our product that if you are not completely satisfied within 3 years, then contact us, & we will provide a full refund immediately.
description: The Windproof Washing Line Hanging Hooks by Smith’s are designed to keep your clothes securely on the line during windy days, preventing any mishaps. Made from durable, high-quality PVC, these hooks leave no peg marks and are built for long-term use. With a versatile design, these hooks fit almost all washing and rotary lines and come in a pack of 24, measuring 6.2 x 4.1 x 0.5 cm. Additionally, Smith’s offers a three-year guarantee, ensuring customer satisfaction with a full refund policy if the hooks do not meet your expectations.
